title: Uncle Alex and Aunt Dee
description: Uncle Alex and Aunt Dee dancing at Jaxon's 10th birthday party in Book 1

title: Artificial Neural Interface
description: The experimental ANI device that allows neural linking between humans and Galinstanian consciousness and, eventually, Utara.

title: Ares Rotating
description: Ares, a moon of Chaos rotating. It's the home of New Eden and most of the characters.

title: Map of Ares around New Eden
description: A Map showing the New Eden area of Ares.

title: Jenni and Xara Bowers as Babies
description: Celectra's identical twin babies, Jenni Jo and Xara Zo Bowers as babies.

title: The Carisco Family Portrait
description: A formal portrait of the Carisco family from Book 2, showing the growing family.

title: The Deep Caves
description: Entrance to the extensive cave system explored over fourteen years. These caves hold ancient Galinstanian secrets.

title: Celectra at Age 8
description: Celectra on her 8th birthday in Book 1's epilogue

title: Celectra's Cabinet of Stones
description: An illuminated cabinet containing Celectra's rock collection including large, precious stones that Galanstanians leave behind as insoluble waste.

title: Celectrum
description: An instrument invented by Jaxon in book 2

title: Galinstanian Being
description: A rare capture of a Galinstanian in their natural form, displaying the characteristic quicksilver reflections.

title: Utopis Station Living Room
description: The Carisco family's living quarters aboard the Utopis space station, featuring a view of Ares.

title: Listener Corps Emblem
description: The elite Listener Corps, trained to communicate with Galinstanian consciousness through neural interfaces.

title: Maya and Sam
description: Maya and Sam at the Samaya Gallery and Museum of Integration's grand opening between books 4 and 5.

title: Maya Painting
description: Maya creating a fingerpaint masterpiece at age 6.

title: Reclamatic (cleaning bot)
description: A robotic floor cleaner that uses MRI tech to deatomize dust, debris, germs and even stains.

title: Sam and Maya
description: Sam and Maya celebrating the grand opening of the Samaya Gallery and Museum of Integration between books 4 and 5.

title: Samaya Gallery and Museum of Integration
description: Art gallery and museum founded and directed by Maya and Sam.

title: Utopis
description: Exterior view of the space station, Utopis. Home of Celectra and Amergio through most of book 1.

title: Xara and Jenni
description: Portrait of Xara and Jenni at age 7 in book 4.

title: New Eden
description: New Eden in books 1 and 2.

title: New Eden
description: New Eden in books 3 and 4.

title: New Eden
description: New Eden in books 5.

title: Celectra Pregnant
description: Celectra carrying twins in her right body.
